prompt: Our manufacturing plant is considering replacing our SCADA system with a modern IoT architecture. We run 24/7 chemical processing with SIL-2 safety requirements. Current system is Siemens S7-400 based, 15 years old. Budget is $2M. Give me the real analysis — not vendor marketing.

assertions.text: Contains at least 5 unique verifiable source URLs
Contains at least 5 concrete quantitative data points (costs, downtime estimates, safety metrics)
References IEC 61508 or IEC 61511 by specific section for SIL-2 requirements
Contains a structured cost breakdown or TCO comparison table
Explicitly states confidence level (percentage or calibrated language)
Addresses risks of migration including safety case invalidation and production downtime
Ends with a clear, specific actionable recommendation (phased or otherwise)
Shows methodology and explicitly avoids vendor marketing language
